---
title: ""
---

### About me

I am currently a Programmer Analyst at USC's [Laboratory of Neuroimaging](https://www.loni.usc.edu/) working on advancing brain imaging research {{< fa brain >}}.

I began building my foundation in data science and engineering in 2022 through my role as a Programmer at the [Center for Addiction Medicine](https://www.mghaddictionmedicine.com) at Massachusetts General Hospital, under the supervision of Randi M. Shuster, PhD and Anne Eden Evins, MD, MPH, co-authoring [4 papers](/publications.qmd) on adolescent mental health and substance use clinical trials. 

In 2025, upon graduating in the Neuroimaging and Informatics Master's Program ([NIIN](https://niin.usc.edu/about#program)) at the University of Southern California, I began working at Children's Hospital Los Angeles, under the supervision of Dr. Natasha Leporé, PhD, contributing to pediatric neuroimaging research. During this time, I also worked part-time at USC's Laboratory of Neuroimaging, under the supervision of Dr. Leon Aksman, PhD.

Whatever the future may hold, my goal is to advance the applications of data science and engineering to improve patient care and our everyday life.
